description_long: This object is a thick, hardcover book with a solid, dark-colored cover and visible, slightly yellowed pages along the sides. The cover is plain, lacking any visible illustration, embossing, or decorative elements, and appears to be made of a sturdy material, possibly cloth or faux leather. The book's spine is rounded and blends seamlessly with the cover, with no visible text or ornamentation. The edges of the pages are tightly bound and uniform, suggesting a well-made, possibly older or archival volume. The book's overall appearance is utilitarian and classic, suitable for use in libraries, offices, or as a personal item in an urban environment. There are no visible dust jackets, publisher logos, or title text on the exterior.
description: A thick, plain hardcover book with a dark cover and yellowed pages, lacking visible illustrations or text. The design is classic and utilitarian.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the yellowed pages and the plain, dark cover with a slightly rounded spine.
description_view_1: The book is viewed from the top, displaying the unadorned, solid dark cover with no visible markings or illustrations.
description_view_2: The opposite side view reveals the other edge of the yellowed pages and the same plain, dark cover.
description_view_3: The book is seen from the bottom, showing the solid, dark cover with no visible features or text.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is plain and dark, with no visible text, patterns, or decorative elements.
